name:
I'm sitting in a grey chair
there's a box pointing at me
description:
I'm sitting in a grey chair
there's a box pointing at me
items_start: Row of 4 buttons -red white blue yellow-
hints: The colored buttons and keyholes create different security badges. You need colored keys.
Each button creates an ID with a different clearance level. You need the matching colored key to activate each button.
Insert the correct colored key, then press the matching button to get that security level badge. Higher clearance opens more doors.
Use colored keys in keyholes then PRESS the matching button. White=visitor, Yellow=maintenance, Blue=security. GET UP to leave the chair.
notes: Inside the ID creation chair. Four colored buttons (red/white/blue/yellow) with keyholes beneath. Insert a colored key and press the matching button to create an ID badge with that clearance level. GET UP or ACT UP to stand and return to room 4.
